input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 17:12 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Litware Inc territory planning

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 10:43 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Litware Inc territory planning

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 12:39 EST
Subject: Re: territory planning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Litware Inc
Date: 2024-02-12
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc), David Chen (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into territory planning.

[00:07:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:10:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:12:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:14:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:16:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:19:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:24:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:28:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
